creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
On my 2.2.5-R box, I can compile libpng-0.96 port successfully.  I
don't know that the difference between success and failure is come from
OS version or port's version.

  I suggest updating FreeBSD from 2.2.0-R to 2.2.5-R (or 2.2-STABLE). 
And try again!


-- 
Jun Kuriyama // kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
